note: As-is baseline (before), copied into the report bundle for a self-contained before/after compare: /gogo:done ships with NO reap step (driving session left alive) and the board's Launch() sets remain-on-exit on, leaving a dead pane after claude exits — both surface as a phantom '● session running' badge that only a manual gogo sweep clears.

diagrams.title: Current ship + board-launch flow — /gogo:done never reaps and Launch() sets remain-on-exit, so the driving session persists and the badge lies until a manual gogo sweep
